summary: Performance optimization testing completed. 20/20 tests passed. POST /api/treats/enhanced now responds in <3 seconds (measured ~1.3s). Fixed 2 critical bugs during testing: (1) duplicate key error due to race condition between insert_one and upsert, (2) HTTPException being wrapped in 500 error.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed race condition bug: Changed db.players.insert_one() to db.players.update_one() with upsert=True and $setOnInsert to avoid duplicate key error when anti_cheat.update_player_streak() creates player with upsert=True during parallel execution
Fixed HTTPException wrapping: Added explicit `except HTTPException: raise` before generic exception handler to prevent 429 rate limit responses from being wrapped in 500 errors
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Line 3563: Changed insert_one to update_one with upsert=True
/app/backend/server.py - Line 3661-3662: Added HTTPException re-raise before generic handler
test_credentials: None required - public API, unique test addresses generated per test
seed_data_creation: Dynamic test addresses created per test run (test_perf_{timestamp}_{uuid})
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance optimization verified: POST /api/treats/enhanced responds in ~1.3 seconds (was >60s before optimization). Key optimizations: (1) Prefetch player + treats in parallel at line 3379-3386, (2) Anti-cheat validation uses prefetched data, (3) Daily status and player update run in parallel. Two bugs fixed during testing: duplicate key race condition and HTTPException wrapping.

treat_creation_performance.details: Consolidated 15+ sequential DB queries into ~5 parallelized ones using asyncio.gather

response_structure.details: Response contains all required fields: treat, outcome, daily_status, streak, message

daily_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/daily-status/{address} responds correctly with all required fields

anti_cheat_validation.details: Rate limiting works correctly with prefetched data, returns 429 when daily limit reached

bugs_fixed_during_testing.bug: E11000 duplicate key error on new player treat creation
bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: Race condition: find_player_by_address returns None, then anti_cheat.update_player_streak creates player with upsert=True (line 220-230 in anti_cheat.py), then server.py line 3563 tries insert_one on same address
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed insert_one to update_one with upsert=True and $setOnInsert to only set fields if player doesn't exist

bugs_fixed_during_testing.bug: 429 rate limit responses returned as 500 errors
bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: Generic exception handler at line 3661-3662 was catching HTTPException and wrapping it in a 500 error
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added explicit 'except HTTPException: raise' before generic exception handler
